subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-27 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: I was in 'Akká for forty and five years. There was none who wept but I wept with them, nor any who sought assistance but I rendered whatsoever aid lay within my power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من چهل و پنج سال در عکا بودم.  کسی نبود که بگرید و من با او نگریم و یا اینکه بقدر امکان معاونت ننمایم
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God
